en: What?
With whom did you have this great sex?
I'm not gonna tell you that.
Fine, don't tell me.
Shell Gordon.
Shell? Sheldon?
No, no, you did not have great sex with Sheldon. I did, too.
ko: 아니, 너는 셸던과 좋은 섹스를 하지 않았어. 나도 그랬어.

en: No, you didn't.
A Sheldon can do your income taxes.
ko: 셸던은 세금 신고를 도와줄 수 있어.

en: If you need a root canal, Sheldon's your man.
But humping and pumping is not Sheldon's strong suit.
It's a name. Do it to me, Sheldon.
You're an animal, Sheldon.
Ride me, big Sheldon. Doesn't work.
ko: 나를 타봐, 큰 셸던. 안 돼.

en: Hi. What can I get you?
I'll have a number three.
I'd like the chef's salad, please, with the oil and vinegar on the side,
ko: 셰프 샐러드 하나 주세요. 드레싱은 따로 주세요.

en: and the apple pie a la mode.
Chef and apple a la mode.
But I'd like the pie heated, and I don't want the ice cream on top. I want it on the side.
ko: 그런데 파이는 따뜻하게 해주시고, 아이스크림은 위에 올리지 말고 옆에 주세요.

en: And I'd like strawberry instead of vanilla, if you have it.
ko: 그리고 바닐라 대신 딸기를 원해요, 있으면요.

en: If not, then no ice cream, just whipped cream.
But only if it's real. If it's out of a can, then nothing.
ko: 단, 진짜 휘핑크림이면요. 통조림이면 아무것도 필요 없어요.
